channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Labor Dept deploys ‘strike team’ to California over $21B unemployment debt, fraud concerns
item.description: Labor Department deploys specialized "strike team" to California over alleged unemployment fraud and $21 billion in improper payments during the pande...

item.title: Trump Raises the Amount of New 'Worldwide Tariff,' Lavishes Praise on Dissenting Justices
Democrats' State of the Union 'Counterprogramming' Promises to Be a Clown Show
Karen Bass's Pothole Photo Op Backfires Spectacularly As Reporter Humiliates Her on Live TV
Trump raises global tariff to 15%
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that a 10% worldwide tariff is now being raised to a "fully allowed" 15% in the wake of the Supreme Court's ruling.

item.title: Mamdani promotes NYC where 'every family can afford a home,' rips ICE's 'cruelty' amid budget blowback
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani spoke Saturday about home affordability and ripped ICE as he faces criticism for floating potential property tax hi...

item.title: Senator John Kennedy: What Tariff Blow? 'Grizzly' Trump Now Roaring Back
Trump reveals his 'new hero' Supreme Court justice after tariffs ruling
item.description: President Donald Trump called one Supreme Court justice his "new hero" after the high court blocked his presidential tariff powers in a 6-3 ruling.

item.title: Trump torches 'stupid' AOC’s Munich showing, tees up fresh fight with progressive Democrats
item.description: President Donald Trump slams Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for stumbling through Taiwan defense question at Munich Security Conference, call...

item.title: Shatner Rocks: Because There's Nothing the Original Captain James T. Kirk Can't Do
